calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Cherry Wood Art, LTD.; and Dina Galimidi.
Principal of $33,883.25
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $294.50
Interest of $1,559.04
For the total money judgment of $38,236.79 and futher ordered that Plaintiff is entitled to immediate possession of the leased equipment: one WEINIG P-26 005 PROFIMAT MOULDER.
Judgment signed in open court.
